title: Sky is blue / Skydome not loading (sol)

messages.content: # Is your sky blue and the skydomes are not loading? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Due to Sol no longer being developed by its creator, any CSP version past `0.2.10` will **NOT** work correctly.

> To downgrade your CSP version, go to `Content Manager > Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > About & Updates` and select `0.2.7` as it is the best release for Sol and No Hesi compatibility.

# Method 2
> Alternatively, you can delete Sol using its included uninstaller.
> **This will also require you to use the BASE filters, modded ones will NOT work.**
## Step 1
> Open your <#1322235675239645184>  and find `soluninstall.bat`
> If it is not there, you need to drag it from the download file into the root folder.

## Step 2
> Run the program and press Y to delete Sol from your game
